title: Tetrion Sugar Soap Trigger Powerful Cleaner for Walls and Surfaces Stain Remover 500ml
availability_text: This item cannot be dispatched to your selected delivery location. Please choose a different delivery location.
features: EFFECTIVE CLEANING: Tetr Sugar Soap Trigger is ideal for removing grease, dirt, and stains from walls, leaving surfaces spotless and ready for painting or decorating
READY-TO-USE FORMULA: Enjoy convenience with our pre-mixed solution, eliminating the need for dilution Simply spray on and wipe off for a thorough clean
VERSATILE APPLICATION: ideal for painted walls, tiles, and kitchen surfaces, this soap offers superior cleaning performance without damaging your surfaces
EASY TO USE TRIGGER: The ergonomic spray trigger allows for precise application and control, making your cleaning tasks effortless and efficient
ECONOMICAL 500ML BOTTLE: Get great value with our 500ml bottle, offering plenty of cleaning power for multiple jobs around the home
description: Product Description The Tetrion brand is one of the most recognisable names within the professional trade market over the last 40+ years. At its launch in the early 1970’s Tetrion changed the filler market with the innovation of the first ‘All Purpose Filler’. With Fillers, Adhesives, Decorating Sundries, and much more, Tetrion covers every aspect of modern household decorating, attracting new tradespeople and DIY enthusiasts with its reputation as one of, if not the best homecare range on the market. Tetrion Sugar Soap Trigger Spray 500ml Tetrion Sugar Soap is a DIY essential, used to ensure a clean and prepared surface ready for decoration. A handy go-to for general household cleaning where grime needs to be removed from a surface. It is ideal for use for any of the applications below: Designed for cleaning and preparing paintwork both inside and outside Effective at cleaning building exteriors. Tetrion Sugar Soap will clean moss and dirt from old masonry and brickwork A handy go-to for general household cleaning where grime needs to be removed from surface Will bring back shine to the bathroom. It is suitable for cleaning baths, sinks, toilet bowls and ceramic tiles Suitable for cleaning most* metal surfaces where grease is likely to accumulate, eg. oven mesh filters and kitchen extractor fans Tetrion Sugar Soap is a versatile DIY essential, excellent to ensure a clean and prepared surface ready for decoration Easily cleans and prepares paintwork both inside and outside. Effective at cleaning building exteriors. Tetrion Sugar Soap will clean moss and dirt from old masonry and brickwork Can be used as an easy-to-prepare cleaner for concrete floors, patios, and driveways. It will remove any unsightly oil or grease stains from stone, concrete, and tarmac surfaces A handy go-to for general household cleaning where grime needs to be removed from a surface Directions for use: Shake the bottle and turn nozzle to "On" position. Spray onto surface and work in with a clean cloth or sponge, removing stains. Wipe excess product from the surface and rinse with clean cold water. Allow the surface to dry thoroughly before painting. Always test product first on an inconspicuous area to confirm suitability. Turn nozzle to "Off" position. Always store and transport the trigger bottle in an upright and secure position. Note: When using on metal, dissolve in water. Tetrion Sugar Soap is non-caustic and non-irritant, but the wearing of gloves is recommended. Protect carpets and furniture prior to use. Any spilled solution should be mopped up immediately with a damp cloth. This product does not contain sugar. *Do not use on aluminium.
